root_cause: Required node affinity does not match any available node
evidence: No nodes satisfy the required node affinity across 2 evaluated nodes

causes.message: Pod declares required node affinity terms
No available node satisfies the Pod's required node affinity
Scheduler rejects all nodes because node affinity requirements are unsatisfied
Pod remains Pending because required node affinity cannot be satisfied

pod:node-affinity-pod: Required node affinity terms do not match any current node labels
node:node1: Node labels do not satisfy the Pod's required node affinity
node:node2: Node labels do not satisfy the Pod's required node affinity

likely_causes: Required node affinity targets labels that are absent from all nodes
Cluster node labels drifted from the Pod's hard placement requirements
The Pod should use preferred affinity instead of required affinity
suggested_checks: Add matching node labels or relax the hard node affinity terms
